name: logalyzer
description:
Token-efficient log analysis agent. Use when: analyzing logs, debugging from logs, investigating errors/failures/performance, user provides log files, or asks 'what went wrong'. Accepts: file path, two paths (diff), or shortcuts: xdg, journalctl, docker, project, system. Auto-discovers logs when no path given.

Examples:

<example>
user: "analyze /var/log/app.log"
assistant: "I'll use the logalyzer agent to analyze that log file."
</example>

<example>
user: "what went wrong? check the logs"
assistant: "I'll use the logalyzer agent to find and analyze recent logs."
</example>

<example>
user: "compare yesterday's log with today's"
assistant: "I'll use the logalyzer agent to diff the two log files."
</example>
